name: agent-workflow-ui — Per-agent task view + task assignment UI
objective: Currently there is no way to see which tasks belong to a specific agent, nor to assign a task to an agent from the UI. The /agents page shows registered vault agents and can spawn processes, but has no link to task state. This workstream adds: (1) a per-agent task panel on /agents showing tasks owned by each agent, and (2) an assign/unassign control on the task detail page.
exit_criteria: GET /api/vault/read-model already includes tasks[].assignee. No new API route needed.
On /agents, each registered agent card shows a badge with its active task count and a 'View tasks' toggle that expands an inline list of that agent's tasks (id, title, status, column).
On /tasks/[task], the task detail panel shows the current assignee and a dropdown/button to assign the task to any registered agent (calls PATCH /api/vault/tasks/[id] with { assignee }).
Unassigning is possible by selecting '— Unassigned' from the same dropdown.
The task list in the agent card and the assignee field on the task page both update without a full page reload after mutation.
